scripts.build: node ../../../scripts/build-cache.mjs --name affine-templates --root ../../.. --cwd packages/frontend/templates --input package.json --input package-lock.json --input packages/frontend/templates/package.json --input packages/frontend/templates/build-edgeless.mjs --input packages/frontend/templates/build-stickers.mjs --input packages/frontend/templates/edgeless-snapshot --input packages/frontend/templates/stickers --output packages/frontend/templates/edgeless --output packages/frontend/templates/edgeless-templates.gen.ts --output packages/frontend/templates/stickers-templates.gen.ts --output packages/frontend/core/public/static/templates -- npm run build:raw
